question: In Ghaffari 2013 spark plasma sintering of Ta0.8Hf0.2C with 12 vol.% MoSi2, what is the hardness of the fully consolidated sample?
reference_answer: The hardness of Ta0.8Hf0.2C with 12 vol.% MoSi2 (sample TH20M12) sintered at 1650°C is 15.2 ± 0.3 GPa.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)
excerpts: Table 1 Properties of various TaC–HfC samples prepared by SPS technique at 1650 ◦C for 5 min under 30 MPa. Composition vol.% TaC HfC MoSi2 TaSi2 Relative density (%) Mean grain size (μm) Hardness (GPa) Fracture toughness (MPa m1/2) TH20M12 80 20 12 100 6.2 15.2 ± 0.3 3.9 ± 0.2 TH30M12 70 30 12 97.8 4.1 15.9 ± 0.6 3.9 ± 0.1

question: In Ghaffari 2013 spark plasma sintering, what is the fracture toughness of Ta0.8Hf0.2C with 12 vol.% TaSi2?
reference_answer: The fracture toughness of Ta0.8Hf0.2C with 12 vol.% TaSi2 (sample TH20T12) is 3.19 ± 0.1 MPa m1/2.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)

question: In Ghaffari 2013 spark plasma sintering of Ta0.8Hf0.2C with 12 vol.% MoSi2, what is the relative density percentage of the sample?
reference_answer: The relative density of Ta0.8Hf0.2C with 12 vol.% MoSi2 (sample TH20M12) is 100%.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)
excerpts: Table 1 Properties of various TaC–HfC samples prepared by SPS technique at 1650 ◦C for 5 min under 30 MPa. Composition vol.% TaC HfC MoSi2 TaSi2 Relative density (%) Mean grain size (μm) Hardness (GPa) Fracture toughness (MPa m1/2) TH20M12 80 20 12 100 6.2 15.2 ± 0.3 3.9 ± 0.2

question: In Ghaffari 2013, what is the mean grain size in micrometers of Ta1-xHfxC with 30 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% MoSi2?
reference_answer: The mean grain size of Ta1-xHfxC with 30 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% MoSi2 (sample TH30M12) is 4.1 μm.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)

question: In Ghaffari 2013, what is the hardness in GPa of Ta1-xHfxC with 30 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% TaSi2?
reference_answer: The hardness of Ta1-xHfxC with 30 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% TaSi2 (sample TH30T12) is 18.2 ± 0.7 GPa.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)

question: In Li 2024 ablation test using oxyacetylene torch, what is the pressure in MPa for the O2 gas?
reference_answer: The O2 pressure during ablation test in Li 2024 is 0.4 MPa, as specified in Table 1 for the testing parameters.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Li et al. (2024)
excerpts: Table 1 Pressure and flux of O2 and C2H2 during ablation test. Type of gas Pressure (MPa) Gas Flux (L/s) Heat flux (MW/m2) O2 0.4 0.42 4.18 C2H2 0.095 0.31 4.18

question: In Li 2024 ablation test, what is the gas flux in L/s for C2H2 during the oxyacetylene torch testing?
reference_answer: The C2H2 gas flux during ablation test in Li 2024 is 0.31 L/s, as specified in Table 1 of the experimental parameters.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Li et al. (2024)
excerpts: Table 1 Pressure and flux of O2 and C2H2 during ablation test. Type of gas Pressure (MPa) Gas Flux (L/s) Heat flux (MW/m2) O2 0.4 0.42 4.18 C2H2 0.095 0.31 4.18

question: In Ghaffari 2013, what is the relative density percentage of Ta1-xHfxC with 10 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% TaSi2?
reference_answer: The relative density of Ta1-xHfxC with 10 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% TaSi2 (sample TH10T12) is 100%.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)

question: In Ghaffari 2013, which TaC-HfC composition with TaSi2 shows the highest hardness value, and what is it in GPa?
reference_answer: The highest hardness among TaC-HfC samples with TaSi2 is 18.2 ± 0.7 GPa, achieved with 30 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% TaSi2 (sample TH30T12).
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)

question: In Ghaffari 2013, what is the mean grain size in micrometers of Ta1-xHfxC with 10 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% TaSi2?
reference_answer: The mean grain size of Ta1-xHfxC with 10 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% TaSi2 (sample TH10T12) is 7.1 μm.
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)

question: In Ghaffari 2013, which TaC-HfC composition with MoSi2 shows the lowest fracture toughness, and what is its value in MPa m1/2?
reference_answer: The lowest fracture toughness among TaC-HfC samples with MoSi2 is 3.2 ± 0.3 MPa m1/2, achieved with 10 vol.% HfC and 12 vol.% MoSi2 (sample TH10M12).
evidence_any: Evidence from Table 1 of Ghaffari et al. (2013)
